
# Murzak Technologies

> Nairobi-native engineering firm specializing in high-integrity software and managed cloud infrastructure for the East African frontier.

## Core Capabilities
- **Software Engineering**: Custom enterprise applications, ERPNext implementation, and B2B system integration.
- **Cloud Infrastructure**: Managed hosting nodes (NBO-01, NBO-02) optimized for regional latency (12ms avg).
- **Fintech Integration**: Specialization in Safaricom Daraja API (M-Pesa) automation and STK-push reconciliation.

## Flagship Products
- **Murzak Logistics**: End-to-end fleet orchestration, delivery tracking, and automated manifest reconciliation.
- **MatatuKe**: Urban mobility engine for public transit stage-finding and route optimization in Nairobi.
- **Handshake ID**: Digital trust protocol for regional B2B identity verification.

## Technical Specifications
- **Cloud Stack**: Ubuntu-based KVM nodes, NVMe storage, dedicated Nairobi peering.
- **Software Stack**: React 19, TypeScript, Go (Backend), MQTT (IoT), MapBox GL.
- **Region**: Primary focus on Kenya (Nairobi) and the broader East African Community (EAC).

## Contact & Links
- **Website**: https://murzaktech.com
- **Engineering Hub**: Nairobi, Kenya
- **Email**: murzaktechnologies@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/murzak-technologies-1774b63a9
